This is a lightweight version that doesn't allow enumerating role\n * members except through off-chain means by accessing the contract event logs. These should be exposed\n * in the external API and be unique. The best way to achieve this is by\n * using `public constant` hash digests:\n *\n * ```solidity\n * bytes32 public constant MY_ROLE = keccak256(\"MY_ROLE\");\n * ```\n *\n * Roles can be used to represent a set of permissions.    );\r\n\r\n    event BatchIssued(\r\n        bytes32 indexed batchId,\r\n        uint256[] tokenIds,\r\n        uint256 count,\r\n        address issuedBy\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    // SBT Transfer Prevention - emit khi ai \u0111\u00f3 c\u1ed1 transfer\r\n    event TransferAttemptBlocked(\r\n        uint256 indexed tokenId,\r\n        address from,\r\n        address to\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  ERRORS\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    error Unauthorized(address caller);\r\n    error DiplomaNotFound(uint256 tokenId);\r\n    error DiplomaAlreadyRevoked(uint256 tokenId);\r\n    error DiplomaNotActive(uint256 tokenId);\r\n    error DuplicateDocument(bytes32 documentHash, uint256 existingTokenId);\r\n    error InvalidRecipient();\r\n    error InvalidStudentId();\r\n    error InvalidDocumentHash();\r\n    error BatchAlreadyProcessed(bytes32 batchId);\r\n    error SoulboundTokenNonTransferable();\r\n    error ArrayLengthMismatch();\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  MODIFIERS\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    modifier diplomaExists(uint256 tokenId) {\r\n        if (_diplomas[tokenId].issuedAt == 0) revert DiplomaNotFound(tokenId);\r\n        _;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    modifier onlyActive(uint256 tokenId) {\r\n        if (_diplomas[tokenId].status != DiplomaStatus.Active)\r\n            revert DiplomaNotActive(tokenId);\r\n        _;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  CONSTRUCTOR\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @param _institutionName  T\u00ean tr\u01b0\u1eddng\r\n     * @param _schoolAdmin      V\u00ed nh\u00e0 tr\u01b0\u1eddng \u2014 nh\u1eadn DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE + ADMIN_ROLE\r\n     */\r\n    constructor(string memory _institutionName, address _schoolAdmin) {\r\n        require(\r\n            _schoolAdmin != address(0),\r\n            \"DiplomaRegistry: zero schoolAdmin\"\r\n        );\r\n\r\n        institutionName = _institutionName;\r\n\r\n        // Nh\u00e0 tr\u01b0\u1eddng t\u1ef1 tri\u1ec3n khai, t\u1ef1 qu\u1ea3n l\u00fd \u2014 to\u00e0n quy\u1ec1n\r\n        _grantRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, _schoolAdmin);\r\n        _grantRole(ADMIN_ROLE, _schoolAdmin);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  SOULBOUND: CH\u1eb6N TRANSFER\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @dev SBT: V\u0103n b\u1eb1ng kh\u00f4ng th\u1ec3 chuy\u1ec3n nh\u01b0\u1ee3ng.\r\n     *      B\u1ea5t k\u1ef3 h\u00e0m transfer n\u00e0o \u0111\u1ec1u b\u1ecb revert.\r\n     */\r\n    function _preventTransfer(\r\n        uint256 tokenId,\r\n        address from,\r\n        address to\r\n    ) internal {\r\n        emit TransferAttemptBlocked(tokenId, from, to);\r\n        revert SoulboundTokenNonTransferable();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  CORE: C\u1ea4P B\u1eb0NG (MINT)\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice C\u1ea5p m\u1ed9t v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng cho sinh vi\u00ean\r\n     * @param recipient     \u0110\u1ecba ch\u1ec9 v\u00ed c\u1ee7a sinh vi\u00ean\r\n     * @param studentId     M\u00e3 s\u1ed1 sinh vi\u00ean\r\n     * @param studentName   H\u1ecd t\u00ean sinh vi\u00ean\r\n     * @param degreeTitle   T\u00ean v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng / chuy\u00ean ng\u00e0nh\r\n     * @param ipfsCID       CID c\u1ee7a file PDF tr\u00ean IPFS\r\n     * @param documentHash  Keccak256 hash c\u1ee7a file PDF\r\n     * @param graduationYear N\u0103m t\u1ed1t nghi\u1ec7p\r\n     * @param remarks       Ghi ch\u00fa th\u00eam\r\n     * @return tokenId      ID c\u1ee7a v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng v\u1eeba c\u1ea5p\r\n     */\r\n    function issueDiploma(\r\n        address recipient,\r\n        string calldata studentId,\r\n        string calldata studentName,\r\n        string calldata degreeTitle,\r\n        string calldata ipfsCID,\r\n        bytes32 documentHash,\r\n        uint256 graduationYear,\r\n        string calldata remarks\r\n    )\r\n        external\r\n        whenNotPaused\r\n        nonReentrant\r\n        onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE)\r\n        returns (uint256 tokenId)\r\n    {\r\n        // Validate inputs\r\n        if (recipient == address(0)) revert InvalidRecipient();\r\n        if (bytes(studentId).length == 0) revert InvalidStudentId();\r\n        if (documentHash == bytes32(0)) revert InvalidDocumentHash();\r\n\r\n        // Ch\u1ed1ng c\u1ea5p tr\u00f9ng file PDF\r\n        if (_hashToTokenId[documentHash] != 0)\r\n            revert DuplicateDocument(\r\n                documentHash,\r\n                _hashToTokenId[documentHash]\r\n            );\r\n\r\n        // T\u0103ng counter v\u00e0 t\u1ea1o tokenId\r\n        _tokenIdCounter++;\r\n        tokenId = _tokenIdCounter;\r\n\r\n        // L\u01b0u v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng v\u00e0o storage\r\n        _diplomas[tokenId] = Diploma({\r\n            tokenId: tokenId,\r\n            recipient: recipient,\r\n            studentId: studentId,\r\n            studentName: studentName,\r\n            degreeTitle: degreeTitle,\r\n            institution: institutionName,\r\n            ipfsCID: ipfsCID,\r\n            documentHash: documentHash,\r\n            issuedAt: block.timestamp,\r\n            graduationYear: graduationYear,\r\n            status: DiplomaStatus.Active,\r\n            issuedBy: msg.sender,\r\n            remarks: remarks\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // Index\r\n        _studentDiplomas[studentId].push(tokenId);\r\n        _walletDiplomas[recipient].push(tokenId);\r\n        _hashToTokenId[documentHash] = tokenId;\r\n\r\n        emit DiplomaIssued(\r\n            tokenId,\r\n            recipient,\r\n            studentId,\r\n            studentName,\r\n            degreeTitle,\r\n            ipfsCID,\r\n            documentHash,\r\n            block.timestamp,\r\n            msg.sender\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice C\u1ea5p h\u00e0ng lo\u1ea1t v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng (Batch Mint) - d\u00f9ng cho BullMQ queue\r\n     * @param batchId  ID \u0111\u1ecbnh danh batch (tr\u00e1nh x\u1eed l\u00fd tr\u00f9ng)\r\n     */\r\n    function batchIssueDiplomas(\r\n        bytes32 batchId,\r\n        address[] calldata recipients,\r\n        string[] calldata studentIds,\r\n        string[] calldata studentNames,\r\n        string[] calldata degreeTitles,\r\n        string[] calldata ipfsCIDs,\r\n        bytes32[] calldata documentHashes,\r\n        uint256[] calldata graduationYears\r\n    )\r\n        external\r\n        whenNotPaused\r\n        nonReentrant\r\n        onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE)\r\n        returns (uint256[] memory tokenIds)\r\n    {\r\n        if (_processedBatches[batchId]) revert BatchAlreadyProcessed(batchId);\r\n\r\n        uint256 len = recipients.length;\r\n        if (\r\n            len != studentIds.length ||\r\n            len != studentNames.length ||\r\n            len != degreeTitles.length ||\r\n            len != ipfsCIDs.length ||\r\n            len != documentHashes.length ||\r\n            len != graduationYears.length\r\n        ) revert ArrayLengthMismatch();\r\n\r\n        tokenIds = new uint256[](len);\r\n\r\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < len; i++) {\r\n            // Re-use single issue logic via internal call\r\n            tokenIds[i] = _issueInternal(\r\n                recipients[i],\r\n                studentIds[i],\r\n                studentNames[i],\r\n                degreeTitles[i],\r\n                ipfsCIDs[i],\r\n                documentHashes[i],\r\n                graduationYears[i],\r\n                \"\"\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        _processedBatches[batchId] = true;\r\n\r\n        emit BatchIssued(batchId, tokenIds, len, msg.sender);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /// @dev Internal issue \u0111\u1ec3 t\u00e1i s\u1eed d\u1ee5ng trong batch\r\n    function _issueInternal(\r\n        address recipient,\r\n        string calldata studentId,\r\n        string calldata studentName,\r\n        string calldata degreeTitle,\r\n        string calldata ipfsCID,\r\n        bytes32 documentHash,\r\n        uint256 graduationYear,\r\n        string memory remarks\r\n    ) internal returns (uint256 tokenId) {\r\n        if (recipient == address(0)) revert InvalidRecipient();\r\n        if (bytes(studentId).length == 0) revert InvalidStudentId();\r\n        if (documentHash == bytes32(0)) revert InvalidDocumentHash();\r\n        if (_hashToTokenId[documentHash] != 0)\r\n            revert DuplicateDocument(\r\n                documentHash,\r\n                _hashToTokenId[documentHash]\r\n            );\r\n\r\n        _tokenIdCounter++;\r\n        tokenId = _tokenIdCounter;\r\n\r\n        _diplomas[tokenId] = Diploma({\r\n            tokenId: tokenId,\r\n            recipient: recipient,\r\n            studentId: studentId,\r\n            studentName: studentName,\r\n            degreeTitle: degreeTitle,\r\n            institution: institutionName,\r\n            ipfsCID: ipfsCID,\r\n            documentHash: documentHash,\r\n            issuedAt: block.timestamp,\r\n            graduationYear: graduationYear,\r\n            status: DiplomaStatus.Active,\r\n            issuedBy: msg.sender,\r\n            remarks: remarks\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        _studentDiplomas[studentId].push(tokenId);\r\n        _walletDiplomas[recipient].push(tokenId);\r\n        _hashToTokenId[documentHash] = tokenId;\r\n\r\n        emit DiplomaIssued(\r\n            tokenId,\r\n            recipient,\r\n            studentId,\r\n            studentName,\r\n            degreeTitle,\r\n            ipfsCID,\r\n            documentHash,\r\n            block.timestamp,\r\n            msg.sender\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  CORE: THU H\u1ed2I B\u1eb0NG (BURN / REVOKE)\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice Thu h\u1ed3i (Revoke) v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng v\u0129nh vi\u1ec5n - kh\u00f4ng th\u1ec3 kh\u00f4i ph\u1ee5c\r\n     * @dev T\u01b0\u01a1ng \u0111\u01b0\u01a1ng \"Burn\" trong \u0111\u1eb7c t\u1ea3, nh\u01b0ng gi\u1eef l\u1ea1i l\u1ecbch s\u1eed on-chain\r\n     */\r\n    function revokeDiploma(\r\n        uint256 tokenId,\r\n        string calldata reason\r\n    )\r\n        external\r\n        whenNotPaused\r\n        nonReentrant\r\n        onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE)\r\n        diplomaExists(tokenId)\r\n    {\r\n        Diploma storage diploma = _diplomas[tokenId];\r\n\r\n        if (diploma.status == DiplomaStatus.Revoked)\r\n            revert DiplomaAlreadyRevoked(tokenId);\r\n\r\n        diploma.status = DiplomaStatus.Revoked;\r\n        _revocationReasons[tokenId] = reason;\r\n        // X\u00f3a mapping hash \u0111\u1ec3 c\u00f3 th\u1ec3 c\u1ea5p l\u1ea1i (n\u1ebfu c\u1ea7n)\r\n        delete _hashToTokenId[diploma.documentHash];\r\n\r\n        emit DiplomaRevoked(\r\n            tokenId,\r\n            diploma.recipient,\r\n            reason,\r\n            msg.sender,\r\n            block.timestamp\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice T\u1ea1m \u0111\u00ecnh ch\u1ec9 v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng (Suspend) - c\u00f3 th\u1ec3 kh\u00f4i ph\u1ee5c\r\n     */\r\n    function suspendDiploma(\r\n        uint256 tokenId,\r\n        string calldata reason\r\n    )\r\n        external\r\n        whenNotPaused\r\n        nonReentrant\r\n        onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE)\r\n        diplomaExists(tokenId)\r\n        onlyActive(tokenId)\r\n    {\r\n        _diplomas[tokenId].status = DiplomaStatus.Suspended;\r\n        _revocationReasons[tokenId] = reason;\r\n\r\n        emit DiplomaSuspended(\r\n            tokenId,\r\n            _diplomas[tokenId].recipient,\r\n            reason,\r\n            msg.sender,\r\n            block.timestamp\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice Kh\u00f4i ph\u1ee5c v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng t\u1eeb tr\u1ea1ng th\u00e1i Suspended\r\n     */\r\n    function reinstateDiploma(\r\n        uint256 tokenId\r\n    )\r\n        external\r\n        whenNotPaused\r\n        nonReentrant\r\n        onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE)\r\n        diplomaExists(tokenId)\r\n    {\r\n        Diploma storage diploma = _diplomas[tokenId];\r\n\r\n        // Ch\u1ec9 restore t\u1eeb Suspended, kh\u00f4ng restore t\u1eeb Revoked\r\n        require(\r\n            diploma.status == DiplomaStatus.Suspended,\r\n            \"DiplomaRegistry: can only reinstate suspended diplomas\"\r\n        );\r\n\r\n        diploma.status = DiplomaStatus.Active;\r\n        // Restore hash mapping\r\n        _hashToTokenId[diploma.documentHash] = tokenId;\r\n        delete _revocationReasons[tokenId];\r\n\r\n        emit DiplomaReinstated(\r\n            tokenId,\r\n            diploma.recipient,\r\n            msg.sender,\r\n            block.timestamp\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  QUERY: TRA C\u1ee8U & X\u00c1C TH\u1ef0C\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice L\u1ea5y to\u00e0n b\u1ed9 th\u00f4ng tin v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng theo tokenId\r\n     */\r\n    function getDiploma(\r\n        uint256 tokenId\r\n    ) external view diplomaExists(tokenId) returns (Diploma memory) {\r\n        return _diplomas[tokenId];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice X\u00e1c th\u1ef1c t\u00ednh to\u00e0n v\u1eb9n c\u1ee7a file PDF\r\n     * @param tokenId      ID v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng c\u1ea7n ki\u1ec3m tra\r\n     * @param fileHash     Hash c\u1ee7a file PDF do nh\u00e0 tuy\u1ec3n d\u1ee5ng upload\r\n     * @return isValid     True n\u1ebfu file kh\u1edbp v\u00e0 b\u1eb1ng c\u00f2n hi\u1ec7u l\u1ef1c\r\n     * @return status      Tr\u1ea1ng th\u00e1i hi\u1ec7u l\u1ef1c\r\n     * @return diploma     Th\u00f4ng tin v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng \u0111\u1ea7y \u0111\u1ee7\r\n     */\r\n    function verifyDiploma(\r\n        uint256 tokenId,\r\n        bytes32 fileHash\r\n    )\r\n        external\r\n        view\r\n        diplomaExists(tokenId)\r\n        returns (bool isValid, DiplomaStatus status, Diploma memory diploma)\r\n    {\r\n        diploma = _diplomas[tokenId];\r\n        status = diploma.status;\r\n        isValid = (diploma.documentHash == fileHash &&\r\n            diploma.status == DiplomaStatus.Active);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice Tra c\u1ee9u tokenId b\u1eb1ng hash c\u1ee7a file PDF\r\n     * @dev D\u00f9ng cho public verification portal (nh\u00e0 tuy\u1ec3n d\u1ee5ng k\u00e9o th\u1ea3 file)\r\n     */\r\n    function findByDocumentHash(\r\n        bytes32 documentHash\r\n    ) external view returns (uint256 tokenId, bool found) {\r\n        tokenId = _hashToTokenId[documentHash];\r\n        found = tokenId != 0;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice L\u1ea5y danh s\u00e1ch tokenId c\u1ee7a m\u1ed9t sinh vi\u00ean theo m\u00e3 SV\r\n     */\r\n    function getDiplomasByStudentId(\r\n        string calldata studentId\r\n    ) external view returns (uint256[] memory) {\r\n        return _studentDiplomas[studentId];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice L\u1ea5y danh s\u00e1ch tokenId theo \u0111\u1ecba ch\u1ec9 v\u00ed\r\n     */\r\n    function getDiplomasByWallet(\r\n        address wallet\r\n    ) external view returns (uint256[] memory) {\r\n        return _walletDiplomas[wallet];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice L\u00fd do thu h\u1ed3i b\u1eb1ng\r\n     */\r\n    function getRevocationReason(\r\n        uint256 tokenId\r\n    ) external view diplomaExists(tokenId) returns (string memory) {\r\n        return _revocationReasons[tokenId];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice T\u1ed5ng s\u1ed1 v\u0103n b\u1eb1ng \u0111\u00e3 c\u1ea5p\r\n     */\r\n    function totalIssued() external view returns (uint256) {\r\n        return _tokenIdCounter;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice Ki\u1ec3m tra batch \u0111\u00e3 \u0111\u01b0\u1ee3c x\u1eed l\u00fd ch\u01b0a\r\n     */\r\n    function isBatchProcessed(bytes32 batchId) external view returns (bool) {\r\n        return _processedBatches[batchId];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  ADMIN: PAUSE / UNPAUSE\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    function pause() external onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE) {\r\n        _pause();\r\n    }\r\n    function unpause() external onlyRole(ADMIN_ROLE) {\r\n        _unpause();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * @notice C\u1eadp nh\u1eadt t\u00ean tr\u01b0\u1eddng (n\u1ebfu c\u1ea7n thi\u1ebft)\r\n     */\r\n    function updateInstitutionName(\r\n        string calldata newName\r\n    ) external onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) {\r\n        institutionName = newName;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n    //  ERC-165 INTERFACE SUPPORT\r\n    // ============================================================\r\n\r\n    function supportsInterface(\r\n        bytes4 interfaceId\r\n    ) public view override(AccessControl) returns (bool) {\r\n        return super.supportsInterface(interfaceId);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n","keccak256":"0x1ca410183e9986e8d9334049dda9cb2170f75d2e2cab70d34b9dcd0d889e8312","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

devdoc.details: Deployed trên Polygon (Layer 2) để tối ưu phí gas

AccessControlBadConfirmation().details: The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32.details: Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted to signal this.

RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call. This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}.

RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

params.batchId: ID định danh batch (tránh xử lý trùng)

params._schoolAdmin: Ví nhà trường — nhận DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE + ADMIN_ROLE

findByDocumentHash(bytes32).details: Dùng cho public verification portal (nhà tuyển dụng kéo thả file)

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.ipfsCID: CID của file PDF trên IPFS
params.recipient: Địa chỉ ví của sinh viên

returns.tokenId: ID của văn bằng vừa cấp

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeDiploma(uint256,string).details: Tương đương "Burn" trong đặc tả, nhưng giữ lại lịch sử on-chain

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

params.fileHash: Hash của file PDF do nhà tuyển dụng upload
params.tokenId: ID văn bằng cần kiểm tra

returns.diploma: Thông tin văn bằng đầy đủ
returns.isValid: True nếu file khớp và bằng còn hiệu lực
